description: Least-privilege capability for the transparent coaching overlay NSPanel window. The panel is created, positioned, shown, and hidden entirely from Rust (tauri-nspanel + WebviewWindow APIs) — those are native calls, not webview IPC, so they need NO core:window permissions here. The webview itself only listens for events (coaching_hint/coaching_position/coaching_dismiss) and invokes the get_settings + hide_overlay app commands (custom commands are not gated by core permissions). Scoped to the 'overlay' label only — the main window is untouched.
